headline: A Look At MarketAxess (MKTX) Valuation As Analyst Caution Builds On Weaker Fundamentals
summary: Board committee changes put governance in focus MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) has drawn fresh attention after analysts highlighted weaker fundamentals compared with peers, just as the company reshapes key board committees with new appointments taking effect on May 1, 2026. See our latest analysis for MarketAxess Holdings. At a share price of $163.19, MarketAxess has faced weaker momentum, with a 7 day share price return of 3.44% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 24.26%. This points to...
